sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65745" key="meirakiecapa/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μειρᾰκῐ-εξᾰπάτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n65745.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">boy-cheater</tr_>, Epigr. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hegesand.</author> </bibl> I.</sense> </entryFree>
